ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dma_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DMA channel */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the DMA channel */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of priority (settable, fixed, etc.) */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym associated with the DMA channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DMA channel and its function */,
  "address" TEXT /* Memory address associated with the DMA channel configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the DMA channel */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the DMA channel was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the DMA channel */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the DMA channel was last modified */,
  "dma_controller" TEXT /* DMA controller associated with the DMA channel (e.g., DMA1, DMA2) */,
  "dma_channel_type" TEXT /* Type of DMA channel (e.g., transmit, receive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dma_channels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dma_channels_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dma_channels_dma_controller FOREIGN KEY ("dma_controller") REFERENCES dma_controllers ("dma_controller_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dma_channels_dma_channel_type FOREIGN KEY ("dma_channel_type") REFERENCES dma_channel_types ("dma_channel_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dma_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the DMA channel */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DMA channel being configured */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration update */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dma_configs_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES dma_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dma_configs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, tester, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with these permissions */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DMA channel linked to the permissions */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit the DMA channel settings */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view the DMA channel settings */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete the DMA channel settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES dma_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DMA channel being modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was modified */,
  "old_priority" INTEGER /* Previous priority level before modification */,
  "new_priority" INTEGER /* New priority level after modification */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES dma_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dma_channel_types" (
  "dma_channel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DMA channel type */,
  "dma_channel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the DMA channel type (e.g., transmit, receive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DMA channel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dma_channel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dma_controllers" (
  "dma_controller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DMA controller */,
  "dma_controller_name" TEXT /* Name of the DMA controller (e.g., DMA1, DMA2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DMA controller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dma_controller_id")
)
